## Recipe Standard Checklist

- [ ] Scenario is specific: platform, runtime, workload, and telemetry outcome are clear.
- [ ] Installation instructions are executable and use placeholders for environment-specific values.
- [ ] Proposed configuration file is included as YAML, Helm values, manifest, annotations, receiver config, or environment variables.
- [ ] Validation steps explain how to confirm telemetry in Splunk Observability Cloud.
- [ ] Troubleshooting and scaling recommendations are included.
- [ ] Official Splunk documentation links are included.
- [ ] No real secrets, tokens, customer data, or private endpoint values are committed.
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` passes.
